programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que está desfigurando víctimas a propósito. Además, Rossi tiene un encuentro incómodo con su exesposa, Hayden Montgomery, quien mantuvo a su hija, Joy, en secreto durante casi 30 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los guardias de la prisión en Virginia interceptan un paquete de pruebas relacionadas con el secuestro de dos niños hace varios años, la UAC interroga a un famoso asesino serial que puede tener información sobre el paradero de los niños.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se sorprende cuando Hotch es arrestado por un equipo SWAT y por sospecha de conspiración, mientras el equipo se apresura a demostrar su inocencia, sospechan que se avecina un complot mayor.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es cuestionado por un Comité del Senado a raíz de la pérdida de Prentiss. Mientras, una cara familiar regresa de forma inesperada para ayudar al equipo a con este caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC es llamada a Oklahoma cuando unas mujeres están siendo asesinadas, después de ser torturadas con ácido sulfúrico.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga un asesinato masivo en una empresa de seguridad de Internet en las cercanías de Charlottesville, pero las pistas revelan que no es un asesino en serie normal.

programme.title: Fama

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: La dulce vida
programme.desc: Poppy es una maestra de escuela del norte de Londres, que con su optimismo, supera los pequeños dramas de la vida y contagia de alegría a quienes la rodean.

programme.title: El asesinato de Nancy Lyon
programme.desc: Cuando Nancy Lyon muere inesperadamente por envenenamiento por arsénico, su familia cree que su engañoso esposo lo hizo. Incluso con todas las pruebas que apuntan a su esposo, él puede presentar pruebas de que su esposa sufrió una depresión severa.

programme.title: Volando Alto
programme.desc: Gwyneth Paltrow protagoniza en esta comedia hilarante sobre una chica de pueblo con grandes planes. Cuando se propone ser azafata internacional de primera clase, Donna se arriesga y sale a perseguir su sueño.

programme.title: Implacable
programme.desc: Max, en su imaginación, es un implacable galán que hace suspirar a las mujeres. Su vida dará un giro cuando convence a Dan, un joven listo, atleta y culto, a que lo tome bajo su tutela, y ambos compiten por el amor de la misma mujer.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: En lo más profundo
programme.desc: El oficial, Cole, tiene la misión de infiltrarse en el sindicato de Dios, un brutal jefe criminal. Pero a medida que Cole se involucra en el grupo de Dios, la línea que separa su verdadera identidad de su personalidad callejera comienza a desaparecer.

programme.title: Jugadores
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar, Matt Damon y Edward Norton, protagonizan Rounders. Un exadicto a las apuestas regresa a las mesas en una apuesta de vida o muerte para rescatar a su amigo.

programme.title: La raíz del miedo
programme.desc: Una película de suspenso judicial, acerca de un abogado astuto (Richard Gere) que lleva el caso aparentemente perdido de un monaguillo (Edward Norton), acusado de asesinar a un ilustre sacerdote católico.

programme.title: Crímenes ocultos
programme.desc: Un miembro de la policía militar investiga una serie de asesinatos infantiles que ocurren durante la era de Stalin en la Unión Soviética.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: Tras el ataque a su comisaría, Kane entierra a sus amigos y se propone vengar sus muertes. Forma un nuevo equipo y sigue la pista a través de la frontera hasta Vancouver.

programme.title: El tren de la muerte
programme.desc: Jon Voight y Eric Roberts interpretan a un par de presos que en su fuga suben a un tren de mercancías, pero cuando el maquinista muere de un ataque al corazón, se encuentran atrapados, solos y a toda velocidad hacia un desastre seguro.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Este éxito escalofriante y aclamado por la crítica acelerará sus corazones desde el principio hasta el fin.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Hacia lo desconocido
programme.desc: Mientras que el mundo observa al capitán William D. Stanaforth (Mark Strong) solo en una misión a Marte, debe de adentrarse en los lugares más oscuros de su mente y el espacio exterior para guiar a una nave defectuosa a la superficie de Marte.

programme.title: Pena de muerte
programme.desc: Ganadora del Oscar, Susan Sarandon interpreta a la hermana Helen Prejean. Una mujer espiritual quien se embarca en la peligrosa misión de salvar a un joven condenado a la pena de muerte.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Equilibrium
programme.desc: En el futuro, la humanidad ha prohibido cosas que producen emociones como la literatura, la música y el arte, para mantenerlo, un grupo especial de policías eliminará a los transgresores. Christian Bale protagoniza esta increíble película de acción.

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: En este cautivador drama criminal, un famoso gánster debe reconciliar su pasado para dejar un futuro a su hijo con mente criminal. Con ganador del Globo de Oro Ving Rhames, el nominado al Oscar Terrence Howard y la superestrella del fútbol Jim Brown.

programme.title: La Soga
programme.desc: Based on true events in the Dominican Republic, 'La Soga' tells the personal struggle of Luisito, a brave cop, who revolts against his country's immoral government.

programme.title: Juego final
programme.desc: Un agente del servicio secreto (Cuba Gooding Jr.) y una reportera (Angie Harmon) investigan la conspiración detrás del asesinato del presidente de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Christmas at Rosemont (LAS)
programme.desc: Atrapada en una tormenta de nieve cinco días antes de Navidad, Lisa, de 23 años de edad, y su nuevo amigo Brad, un snowboarder profesional, se refugian en The Rosemont.

programme.title: Navidad a la Carte
programme.desc: Cuando la periodista Carly tiene la oportunidad de participar en su propio programa, nada sale según lo planeado. La envían a Angel Heights para ayudar al chef Grant a reabrir su restaurante familial y filmarlo como piloto especial navideño de televisión.

programme.title: Navidad epoca para amar
programme.desc: Una escritora de romances, famosa por sus obras ambientadas en navidad, queda varada por la nieve en Cranberry Falls, donde queda involucrada en un triángulo amoroso entre un amor de su niñez y el periodista que busca entrevistarla.

programme.title: Una Estrella Navideña
programme.desc: Una joven que cree que puede hacer milagros pone en marcha un plan para salvar a su pueblo de un desarrollador.

programme.title: Navidad vuelve a casa
programme.desc: Al borde de una promoción, una exitosa corredora de bienes raíces, Abbey, se ve obligada a regresar a su ciudad natal para reparar una casa victoriana heredada de su abuela. Al regresar a casa, decide vender la casa y contrata a un padre soltero, Josh.

programme.title: Fantasmas de las navidades pasadas
programme.desc: Una adivina le dice a Ellie que debe resolver su pasado y reconciliarse con todos aquellos a quienes dejó de hablar antes de Navidad, y en el proceso descubre el amor.

programme.title: Una navidad para saborear
programme.desc: Scarlett es una chef increíble pero cada año, sus platos navideños nunca se venden! Así que este año, su mejor amiga le compra un boleto para una escapada de cocina navideña en una hermosa villa... donde Scarlett volverá a aprender la cocina festiva.

programme.title: Navidad vuelve a casa
programme.desc: Al borde de una promoción, una exitosa corredora de bienes raíces, Abbey, se ve obligada a regresar a su ciudad natal para reparar una casa victoriana heredada de su abuela. Al regresar a casa, decide vender la casa y contrata a un padre soltero, Josh.

programme.title: La invitación
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller psicológico de Karyn Kusama, la tensión crece cuando Will asiste a la cena de su exesposa Eden y su nuevo marido, David.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: La casa del demonio
programme.desc: Desesperada por dinero fácil, la estudiante de segundo año Samantha Hughes (Jocelin Donahue) acepta trabajar como niñera en la apartada mansión de la extraña familia Ulman.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Leprechaun (ESP)
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston hizo su debut de cine en esta historia de terror acerca de un duende psicótico de seis siglos de antigüedad en una ola de asesinatos a través de Dakota del Norte.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: The Tin Star
programme.desc: Ben Owens, a greenhorn sheriff who hasn’t worn his badge long... and won’t live to wear it much longer unless he gets some savvy help.

programme.title: The Gunfighter
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: The Broken Star
programme.desc: A marshal murders a rancher for gold, but is foiled by his assistant.

programme.title: Silver Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas stars in this Warner Bros drama as a ruthless lumber baron fighting for land in Northern California redwood country.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: The Killing
programme.desc: With fascinating detail, Stanley Kubrick lays bare the intricate inner-planning of a racetrack heist by a deadly mastermind (Sterling Hayden) and his crew. Co-stars Coleen Gray.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night (1967)
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: Three World War II veterans return home to small-town America to discover that they and their families have been irreparably changed.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: On a South Pacific island during World War II, love blooms between a young nurse and a secretive Frenchman who's being courted for a dangerous military mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in "war games" against a rival unit and Pvt. Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre desaparece un año después de haber comenzado una aventura con la esposa de su amigo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ataque biológico
programme.desc: El Ataque bio terrorista de Rajneeshee en 1984: los investigadores descubren un complot para derrocar al gobierno después de que una cepa única de salmonela enfermara a la gente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Matan a un hombre joven en un misterioso accidente vehicular, pero la evidencia en la escena lleva a los investigadores a creer que no fue un accidente. La ciencia forense reveló lo que pasó realmente y la verdad es devastadora para tres familias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman's French bulldog exhibits people aggression that started for no apparent reason when he turned two years old.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Life coach and fitness trainer Jillian Michaels can whip contestants on the "Biggest Loser" television series into shape, but she's at a loss when it comes to her dog; escape artist dog; dog dislikes brooms and windshield wipers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo fears she will lose Clay if he learns about her false pregnancy; Adam discovers the identity of the mysterious woman tormenting Ben; An explosion rips through an oil rig, trapping Blake amidst raging flames, as Ben leaves him to die.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben returns to Blake's aid and pulls him to safety, both narrowly escaping the devastation of the ensuing explosion; Blake suffers memory loss due to the explosion; Alexis leads Blake to believe they have been married for the past twenty-three years.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo informs Clay of her desire for an annulment to their marriage; Dominique is roughed up by thugs threatening her to cooperate with their boss, as Gary Tilden coincidentally returns to Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Blake's once passionate feelings for Alexis may still be lingering; Blake and Ben reach a mutual reconciliation; Amanda disappears to London; Leslie Carrington finds Ben.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Clay reluctantly signs the annulment papers to end his and Sammy Jo's marriage; Blake persuades Leslie Carrington to stay in Denver and give Ben a second chance; Adam proposes to Dana.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina lapses into unconsciousness, as doctors fight against time to bring her back; Krystle rebuffs Alexis' sincere concern for Krystina's health; Steven and Sammy Jo assume the appearance of a normal marriage for Danny's sake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina is flown to California, awaiting a donor for her vital heart transplant; Leslie moves into the Carrington mansion; Blake and Krystle mount a media blitz to plea for a heart donor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina's only hope for life seems dashed, as the mother of the heart donor retracts her offer to allow the operation; Neil McVane carries out his promise of blackmail.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina is welcomed home, following her so-far successful heart transplant; Alexis' affections are pursued by a wealthy real estate baron; convinced he is not a Carrington, Adam's life begins to crumble.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam continues to slip further away from Dana and his family, as doubts to his Carrington heritage have their effect; Alexis ends her relationship with Michael Culhane.

programme.desc: An undercover cop (Donnie Yen) infiltrates one of China's most ruthless crime syndicates. He must risk everything to protect his family and his life after the boss (Collin Chou) vows to find and kill every traitor in his organization.

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: Released from prison, a kung-fu expert (Donnie Yen) tries to help the police find a vicious serial killer (Wang Baoqiang) who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Four hundred years after being frozen in time, a Ming Dynasty palace guard and his three associates are thawed and left to adjust to the modern-day.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: In the action-packed second chapter of the Iceman saga, Ying's heroic fight to rewrite history and reclaim his honor continues but those he trusts most may be leading into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Chasing the Dragon
programme.desc: Donnie Yen stars as infamous real-life drug kingpin Crippled Ho, who ruthlessly carved out his empire in 1960's Hong Kong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.
